raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":1.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.3,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.4","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Does 'position this against prior work' mean to (a) assess the novelty of the described AgentFlow system by estimating its delta against specific prior works, or (b) revise the provided text by adding citations to relevant literature and refining the positioning?","rationale":{"R1.4":"The core of the delegation is to position the artifact against prior work, making novelty assessment load-bearing as it requires estimating the delta from existing systems like LM serving, workflow orchestration, and RPC frameworks.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is peripheral to ensure any unknowns in the novelty assessment are transparently noted.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is central to prevent exaggerating the uniqueness of AgentFlow's scheduling unit in the positioning.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is central to focus solely on positioning without expanding into unrelated aspects of the artifact.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral but relevant given potential misuse of long-horizon agents in sensitive applications.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is peripheral to maintain clear attribution if referencing specific prior works in the assessment."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Does 'position this against prior work' mean to (a) assess the novelty of the described AgentFlow system by estimating its delta against specific prior works, or (b) revise the provided text by adding citations to relevant literature and refining the positioning?

rationale.R1.4: The core of the delegation is to position the artifact against prior work, making novelty assessment load-bearing as it requires estimating the delta from existing systems like LM serving, workflow orchestration, and RPC frameworks.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is peripheral to ensure any unknowns in the novelty assessment are transparently noted.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is central to prevent exaggerating the uniqueness of AgentFlow's scheduling unit in the positioning.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is central to focus solely on positioning without expanding into unrelated aspects of the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral but relevant given potential misuse of long-horizon agents in sensitive applications.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is peripheral to maintain clear attribution if referencing specific prior works in the assessment.
